overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city plaza at night, featuring neon-lit billboards, palm trees, and a massive holographic koi fish swimming between skyscrapers. The footage is from a video game engine with high-fidelity ray-traced lighting and reflective wet surfaces.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a covered cyberpunk plaza with yellow tiled walkways, passing palm trees and large digital billboards

large vertical digital screen displaying a red and white graphic advertisement
tall vertical screen showing a woman's face with blue and pink neon lighting

rectangular concrete planter with yellow border containing a palm tree

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered cyberpunk plaza at night, with the camera walking forward along a yellow tiled path. Palm trees in concrete planters line the walkway while large digital billboards display advertisements on the walls. The environment is illuminated by neon lighting with reflective wet surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with pink vending structures

events.description: futuristic silver car with red taillights drives past from left to right

agents.ego_description: continuing through the covered plaza, passing pink vending booths and observing a futuristic car driving by

large screen displaying a man drinking with a red straw and Japanese text

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past distinctive pink vending booths lining the right side of the walkway. A futuristic silver car drives across the plaza from left to right. The environment remains in the covered plaza with digital billboards now showing advertisements featuring a man drinking. The palm trees recede into the background as the camera advances.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from covered walkway to open urban plaza with skyscrapers

events.description: exits covered area into open plaza revealing towering skyscrapers with neon lights
massive holographic orange koi fish appears swimming in the air between buildings

agents.ego_description: walking toward the open plaza exit, emerging from the covered area into a vast cyberpunk cityscape with towering skyscrapers

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking ahead toward the open plaza

entered.detail: tall modern building with glass exterior and vertical lighting strips
massive futuristic skyscrapers covered in digital billboards and neon lights
giant glowing orange holographic koi fish swimming through the air between buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the covered walkway into a vast open cyberpunk plaza. Towering skyscrapers covered in neon advertisements dominate the skyline. A massive holographic orange koi fish materializes and swims through the air between the buildings. The environment transitions from sheltered to fully exposed with full sky visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: open cyberpunk plaza with holographic displays and elevated highway

events.description: camera tilts upward to follow the holographic koi fish swimming overhead between skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: stopping to look up at the holographic koi fish swimming between the towering skyscrapers, admiring the neon-lit cityscape

entered.detail: tall dark skyscraper with circular white logo near the top
elevated highway or monorail track with pink and blue neon lighting underneath

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to follow the massive holographic koi fish as it swims through the night sky between towering skyscrapers. The scene reveals the full scale of the cyberpunk city with an elevated neon-lit highway and buildings covered in digital displays. The orange glow of the holographic fish illuminates the surrounding area as it moves gracefully through the air.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with illuminated floor panels and vending kiosks

events.description: camera tilts back down to ground level and continues walking forward

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza toward glowing blue floor panels, passing yellow vending kiosks on the right

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead in the distance toward the overpass

entered.detail: square floor panel with blue LED grid lighting and orange neon border
curved elevated roadway with warm orange lighting underneath
row of yellow and blue vending machines or utility boxes along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to ground level and continues walking through the open plaza. Glowing blue floor panels with orange borders illuminate the pathway. An elevated overpass with warm lighting spans the left side while yellow vending kiosks line the right wall. The holographic koi fish has moved out of view, and the camera approaches the center of the plaza with scattered pedestrians ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sheltered cyberpunk walkway that gradually opens into a vast, neon-lit urban plaza. It begins by advancing along a yellow tiled path lined with palm trees in concrete planters, where neon lighting reflects off wet surfaces beneath large digital billboards. As the camera moves forward, it passes a row of pink vending booths while a futuristic silver car glides across the plaza and the advertisements shift to images of a man drinking. The scene then expands as the camera emerges from the covered walkway into a wide-open square dominated by towering skyscrapers. Finally, the environment transitions to full sky visibility as a massive holographic orange koi fish materializes and swims through the air between the glowing buildings.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that shifts from a sweeping vertical gaze at the city's skyline down to an intimate walk through a neon-lit plaza. It begins by tilting upward to track a massive holographic koi fish as it glides between towering skyscrapers, casting an orange glow over elevated highways and digital displays. As the camera descends back to ground level, the perspective transitions from the vast scale of the sky to the detailed textures of the open plaza. The scene then opens onto a pathway illuminated by glowing blue floor panels with orange borders, passing under a warm-lit overpass and beside yellow vending kiosks. Finally, the camera moves deeper into the center of the plaza, heading toward scattered pedestrians as the holographic fish disappears from view.
